metadata.description: A male-presenting individual, estimated to be in their 40s, has deep skin with a slightly textured appearance, particularly around the eyes and forehead. Their face is oval with a defined jawline. The hair is short, tightly curled, a mix of dark gray and black, and recedes slightly at the temples. Striking green eyes are almond-shaped and set evenly, complemented by medium-thick, slightly arched eyebrows. The nose is broad with a straight bridge and a rounded tip. Lips are medium-thick with a well-defined cupid's bow. A neatly trimmed beard and mustache, also a mix of dark gray and black, covers the chin and upper lip. The expression is neutral, with the head angled directly forward.
metadata.anchor: Green eyes and salt-and-pepper curly hair.
metadata.action_scenario: standing at a busy bar holding a glass, soft warm lighting, medium full-body shot, face clearly visible
